results.question: How many filings have 'FORM 10-K' in their primary document description?
What is the total number of filers whose fiscal year ends in January?
How many filings are associated with each filer whose entity type is 'operating'?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?filer_name (COUNT(?filing) AS ?filing_count) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k> WHERE {
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_entity_type> "operating" .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filer_name .
} GROUP BY ?filer_name
ORDER BY DESC(?filing_count)
results.expected_answer:
CitroTech Inc. | 11
FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORP | 3
SOUTHERN CO | 3
Xerox Holdings Corp | 2
EPR PROPERTIES | 2
ENBRIDGE INC | 2
Public Storage | 2
SolarWindow Technologies, Inc. | 2
VALLEY NATIONAL BANCORP | 2
FIFTH THIRD BANCORP | 2
... (488 total rows)
full_expected_items: United States Commodity Index Funds Trust | 1
HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC | 1
KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. | 1
PEOPLES BANCORP OF NORTH CAROLINA INC | 1
Invesco CurrencyShares British Pound Sterling Trust | 1
Invesco DB Commodity Index Tracking Fund | 1

results.question: How many filings are associated with each filer?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?filer_name (COUNT(?filing) AS ?filing_count)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k>
WHERE {
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filer_name .
}
GROUP BY ?filer_name
ORDER BY DESC(?filing_count)
LIMIT 10
results.expected_answer:
CitroTech Inc. | 11
SOUTHERN CO | 3
FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORP | 3
FIFTH THIRD BANCORP | 2
Soluna Holdings, Inc | 2
FEDERAL AGRICULTURAL MORTGAGE CORP | 2
EPR PROPERTIES | 2
ENBRIDGE INC | 2
VALLEY NATIONAL BANCORP | 2
Xerox Holdings Corp | 2

results.question: Which filers have filed the most 10-K filings?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?filerName (COUNT(?filing) AS ?filingCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k> WHERE {
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filerName .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
  ?filing <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filing_form_type> "10-K" .
} GROUP BY ?filerName ORDER BY DESC(?filingCount) LIMIT 10
results.expected_answer:
CitroTech Inc. | 11

SOUTHERN CO | 3
Public Storage | 2
Xerox Holdings Corp | 2
SolarWindow Technologies, Inc. | 2
Soluna Holdings, Inc | 2
FIFTH THIRD BANCORP | 2
FEDERAL AGRICULTURAL MORTGAGE CORP | 2
EPR PROPERTIES | 2

results.question: Which filers have filed exhibits and what is the total number of filings associated with each of these filers?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?filer_name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?filing) AS ?total_filings) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k> WHERE {
  ?exhibit <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Exhibit> .
  ?exhibit <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/exhibit_filed_by> ?filer .
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filer_name .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
} GROUP BY ?filer_name
ORDER BY DESC(?total_filings)
LIMIT 10
results.expected_answer:
Xerox Holdings Corp | 2
NSTAR ELECTRIC CO | 1
Embrace Change Acquisition Corp. | 1
HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC | 1
XBiotech Inc. | 1
AYTU BIOPHARMA, INC | 1
HENNESSY ADVISORS INC | 1
IIOT-OXYS, Inc. | 1
Rush Street Interactive, Inc. | 1
GRANITE CONSTRUCTION INC | 1
full_expected_items: HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC | 1

results.question: Find the names of filers who have filed at least one '10-K' form and are incorporated in a state with 'A' in its name, along with the count of such filings.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?filer_name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?filing) AS ?num_10k_filings) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k> WHERE {
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filer_name .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
  ?filing <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filing_form_type> "10-K" .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_incorporated_in> ?state_of_incorporation .
  ?state_of_incorporation <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/StateOfIncorporation> .
  ?state_of_incorporation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/state_name> ?state_name .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?state_name)), "a"))
} GROUP BY ?filer_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?filing) > 0)
ORDER BY DESC(?num_10k_filings)
LIMIT 10
results.expected_answer:
ENBRIDGE INC | 2
PROG Holdings, Inc. | 1
HERBALIFE LTD. | 1
NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC | 1
HERITAGE COMMERCE CORP | 1
Community West Bancshares | 1
Triton International Ltd | 1
SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA GAS CO | 1
NSTAR ELECTRIC CO | 1
DYNEX CAPITAL INC | 1
